summary: Completed comprehensive testing of IPO Match Maker module. Backend APIs are fully functional with 100% success rate. All 11 professional categories, cities, and demo professionals are properly seeded. Frontend has authentication cookie persistence issues preventing full UI testing.

integration_issues.issue: Session cookies not persisting across page navigations, causing redirects to login page

passed_tests: Session token authentication works for backend APIs
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend authentication cookie persistence issue. Session cookies are not being maintained across page navigations, causing users to be redirected to login page when accessing /matchmaker routes. This prevents testing of the Match Maker UI functionality despite backend APIs working perfectly.
